title: Section 11
content: 1[11. Power to make rules.-- (1) The Central Government may make rules to carry out the purposes of this Act. (2) Every rule made under this Act after the commencement of the Salaries and Allowances of Ministers (Amendment) Act, 1977 shall be laid before each House of Parliament and no such rule shall come into force until it has been approved, whether with or without modifications, by each House of Parliament and published by the Central Government in the Official Gazette.]
footnote: 1 Subs. by Act 37 of 1977, s. 2, for section 11 (w.e.f. 9-12-1977).
